task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Role-Based Access Control** (Level 8)

Build an API with role-based access. Users have roles (admin/editor/viewer). POST /api/articles creates articles (editors and admins only). DELETE /api/articles/:id deletes (admins only). GET /api/articles lists all (anyone with auth). Viewers can read but not create or delete.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create a
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  role, required

create an Articles table:
  title, required
  body
  author_id

# Registration endpoint
when user sends user_data to /api/register:
  validate user_data:
    email must not be empty
    password must not be empty
    role must not be empty
  saved = save user_data to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint
when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  all_users = get all Users
  user = null
  for each u in all_users:
    if u's email is credentials's email:
      user = u
  if user is null:
    send back 'invalid credentials' with status 401
  if credentials's password is not user's password:
    send back 'invalid credentials' with status 401
  send back { token: 'jwt_token_' + user's id, user: user } with status 200

# Get all articles (authenticated users only)
when user calls GET /api/articles:
  requires login
  articles = get all Articles
  send back articles

# Create article (editors and admins only)
when user sends article_data to /api/articles:
  requires login
  all_users = get all Users
  user = null
  for each u in all_users:
    if u's id is current user's id:
      user = u
  if user's role is 'viewer':
    send back 'forbidden' with status 403
  article_data's author_id is current user's id
  saved = save article_data to Articles
  send back saved with status 201

# Delete article (admins only)
when user calls DELETE /api/articles/:id:
  requires login
  all_users = get all Users
  user = null
  for each u in all_users:
    if u's id is current user's id:
      user = u
  if user's role is not 'admin':
    send back 'forbidden' with status 403
  delete Article with this id
  send back 'deleted' with status 204
